title: Beyond chatbots: How AI agents built a full OS, web apps, and more
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates AI agents executing long-running multi-day pipelines to build non-trivial software including operating systems and optimized web applications. The video argues agents represent a shift beyond basic chatbot interactions toward autonomous problem-solving in software engineering.
